title: henckelia bifolia
intro: Henckelia bifolia, also known as the 'Gentian Bunga Kelam', is a type of flowering plant native to Southeast Asia, particularly in the tropical regions of Malaysia and Indonesia. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Henckelia bifolia are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support the immune system. Henckelia bifolia can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tonics, which have been used to treat various health conditions.
